case_title: ANA MARIA BELTRAN VS. BOOTJACK HOLDINGS LLC

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BELTRAN, ANA MARIA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE PRIOR HEARING AND IF THERE WERE NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 - SERVED JUN-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTJACK HOLDINGS LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,696.00 FILED BY BELTRAN, ANA MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTJACK HOLDINGS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-31-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ANA MARIA BELTRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-09-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ANA MARIA BELTRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BOOTJACK HOLDINGS LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HAUS GEISZLER, MANAGER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
